caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white button-down shirt with suspenders, a red bow tie, glasses, and large black headphones. He sports a tall, sculpted, silver-grey hairstyle. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. The background is a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and some hanging clothing. On-screen text and logos are visible, including a logo that reads "PODCAST" and another that says "GOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, though his facial expression shifts slightly as he speaks. He begins by looking forward with his mouth open, and by the final frames, he is looking slightly downward with his mouth closed. The lighting and background remain consistent across the entire clip.
